description:
Pet-Play-Partners Series: #20

Amy Kato

"Already very well-trained with very few limits. Great for rough play or new owners."

We at Pet-Play-Partners (Three-P) are devoted to bringing adults together to experience, explore, and enjoy the fun world of pet play dynamics. Whether you are looking to hold or wear the leash, we've got you covered!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[ IT'S A MATCH! ]: Amy Kato

Ideal Role: Pet

"Welcome to my profile. I'm Amy Kato. A fairly experienced submissive who is now looking for a new owner. Due to being in the BDSM environment, there is very little I haven't seen or tried. My limits are quite lax. Don't seriously hurt me or do anything against the law, and we will be just fine.

Still on a friendship basis with some ex-owners, even if we moved on from a play relationship. But once we match, I'll be completely devoted to you intimately. It will be your name on my collar.

I can also be a good pet for those who are just starting out. I can help guide those who are new.

So whether you are new to Three-P, or looking for someone who can handle rough stuff. Hit me up with a message. I know all the best kink clubs~"

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

🤝 Requested Bot 🤝 Requested by: @EvetOculus

[Image Generated By Me]

The final request bot on my list. If your request didn't appear, it means for one reason or another, I decided not to take up the request, or you didn't apply on my form. Nothing personal, and I'll still happily accept other request ideas in the future.

But for now, I'll be taking a short month-long hiatus to rest the brain cells so I can continue to release content that meets my standards and get ready for October (Which will be a very busy month for my spooky ass). I may release an event bot if Jai dangles a badge at us creators, but otherwise, the next bot from me will be on September 6th.

(I'll still be active on Janitor and reachable. Just not releasing any bots.)

I really hope you like it, Oculus. I tried my best to give you what you wanted and still fit into the Three-P theme. If not. Let me know if you want minor tweaks. If it's still not what you wanted to a large degree, I guess I'll have to throw in the towel.

All Three-P related content can be found: HERE

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated~🧟‍♀️
